hero.kicker: The Prime Daon, built on customer trust
hero.title:
We create products that satisfy our customers,
and beyond.
hero.subtitle: From the flexibility of sample development to the precision of mass production. With over 10 years of meticulous process management,<br className=\'hidden md:block\'/>we deliver the best results within the promised time.

about.title: About Us
about.main_copy: Uncompromising Honesty, the Premium Manufacturing Partner Trusted by Global Brands.
about.sub_copy:
We create the highest value behind the scenes.
Since our establishment in 2014, The Prime Daon has silently manufactured premium leather products and smart device accessories based on our firm philosophy of 'Honest Production'.
Our team of 15 seasoned artisans with over 20 years of know-how and 3 management staff work together to implement a perfect in-house one-stop system from design planning and pattern making to strict total quality inspection (QC).
Through thorough adherence to delivery schedules and quality control tailored to the customer's perspective, we will be your most reliable manufacturing forward base leading your successful global business.

global_partners.title: Global Partners
global_partners.desc:
From top-tier fashion houses like Mont**** and Wooy**** to high-end mobile accessories for Sam**** and Spi***. There is an unchanging reason why demanding domestic and international major companies choose our quality.
Connect our solid manufacturing references, built upon numerous successful projects, to your business today.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.main_copy: Overwhelming Manufacturing Infrastructure, A System Towards Perfection.
capabilities.sub_copy: Providing the best results with cutting-edge equipment and 20 years of know-how.

capacity.title: Monthly Capacity
capacity.subtitle: (Approx. 500,000 units annually)
capacity.desc: ※ Production volume can be flexibly adjusted depending on product characteristics and difficulty.

global_network.title: Global Network
global_network.subtitle: Strategic Production MOU with Qingdao K&J Corp.
global_network.desc: Building a stable and fast mass production and delivery system through our domestic infrastructure and global partnerships.

Please feel free to describe the type of product, estimated quantity, desired delivery date, and any other details.

e.g., Leather smartphone cases, 1,000 units, desired delivery by end of August

footer.intro: Premium leather goods and smart device accessories OEM/ODM manufacturing partner, including protective cases, wallets, and pouches.

capabilities_process.headerDesc: Perfect Harmony of Advanced Technology and Expert Know-how

steps.title: Precision CAD Design
steps.desc: Accurate structural modeling in a digital environment to establish the perfect blueprint.
detail: Optimal Material Nesting for Maximum Yield

steps.title: Laser Processing (Cutting)
steps.desc: Advanced CO2 laser technology ensures smooth, flawless cutting of complex curves without burn marks.
detail: High-Speed Cutting System for Mass Production

steps.title: High-Speed Precision Press
steps.desc: The Prime Daon's proprietary clicking press process consistently replicates artisanal details even in mass production.
detail: Optimized Lead-Time for Global Bulk Orders

steps.title: Special Stitching & Assembly
steps.desc: Combining experienced craftsmanship with specialized sewing infrastructure to bring out unparalleled durability.
detail: Uniform Stitch Quality Meeting Luxury Standards

capabilities_apple.s1Desc: Autodesk AutoCAD-based engineering. A perfect design with zero margin for error is the start of every product.
capabilities_apple.s2Desc: Advanced laser cutting and skiving machines minimize heat damage and protect the natural texture of the leather.
capabilities_apple.s3Desc: High-speed and thermal press lines handle bulk orders, guaranteeing uniform standards effortlessly.
capabilities_apple.s4Desc: Powered by 9 specialized sewing machines and 3 hot stamping machines. We create 3D silhouettes unique to luxury brands.

capabilities_bento.heroDesc: The fusion of structural precision and sensory detail. Introducing the high-end B2B mass production ecosystem built by The Prime Da-on.
capabilities_bento.sec1Head:
01. CAD Design & Laser Cutting
Controlling the 0.1mm Margin of Error
capabilities_bento.card1Desc: Completely deconstruct and interpret complex global Tech Packs. By digitalizing master guidelines to realize a flawless fit for mobile accessories and bags, we maximize material yield.
capabilities_bento.card2Desc: Advanced laser cutting machinery expanding beyond manual craftsmanship limitations. Proprietary thermal-control processing prevents damage to leather fibers, ensuring clean perforation and micro-logo engraving.
capabilities_bento.sec2Head:
02. Automated Production & 3D Stitching
Securing Quality Standards in Bulk Production
capabilities_bento.card3Desc: An automated high-pressure press line built to seamlessly manage tens of thousands of processing requests daily. Replicating mold dimensions exactly guarantees absolute uniformity from the 1st to the 10,000th product.
capabilities_bento.card4Desc: Operating 11 specialized machines including automated computer sewing, tarp-type, and post-bed setups. We flawlessly execute challenging corner roundings and curved silhouettes unachievable via flat-bed methods.
capabilities_bento.sec3Head:
03. Infrastructure Metrics
Proven Reliability in Numbers

capabilities_excellence.heroDesc: Unveiling the high-end B2B mass production ecosystem built by The Prime Da-on.
capabilities_excellence.s1Desc: Based on Autodesk AutoCAD, we perfectly analyze Tech Packs from global brands. Converting design into precise data maximizes yield and completely eliminates fit errors.
capabilities_excellence.s2Desc: Advanced laser equipment beyond manual limits. We suppress damage to leather fibers to the extreme, cutting complex patterns and micro-logos with perfect edges.
capabilities_excellence.s3Desc: A high-pressure press line that replicates mold specifications 100%. Managing tens of thousands of units daily, the 10,000th product is identical to the first.
capabilities_excellence.c1Desc: Achieves 3D curved silhouettes for high-end bags and cases, impossible with standard flat sewing.
capabilities_excellence.c2Desc: Ensures uniform stitch counts and spacing without a single error, meeting luxury standards.
capabilities_excellence.c3Desc: The final finishing process using dedicated leather hot stampers for clear, luxurious brand logo engraving.

capabilities_light.heroDesc: The fusion of structural precision and sensory detail. Experience the high-end B2B mass production ecosystem built by The Prime Da-on.
capabilities_light.card1Desc: Autodesk AutoCAD-based 2D/3D engineering. We analyze complex Tech Packs perfectly and maximize yield with a design that tolerates zero error.
capabilities_light.card2Desc: Advanced laser tech beyond manual limits. Perforating intricate patterns without damaging leather fibers.
capabilities_light.card3Desc: High-pressure press lines handling tens of thousands of units daily. Always maintaining identical specs to the very first unit.
capabilities_light.card4Desc: 11 specialized sewing lines including tarp and computer-automated machines. We flawlessly complete curved 3D silhouettes impossible with standard flat sewing.

capabilities_dynamic.h_desc: The fusion of precision and sensory detail. Experience The Prime Da-on's high-end mass production ecosystem.
capabilities_dynamic.s1_desc: AutoCAD-based precision design. Analyzing global Tech Packs to digitize a perfect fit with zero tolerance for error.
capabilities_dynamic.s2_desc: Advanced lasers beyond manual limits. Perforating intricate patterns with perfect edges without damaging leather fibers.
capabilities_dynamic.s3_desc: High-pressure press lines handling tens of thousands of units daily. The 10,000th product matches the first perfectly.
capabilities_dynamic.s4_c1_d: Completing 3D curved silhouettes impossible with standard flat sewing.
capabilities_dynamic.s4_c2_d: Controlling heat and pressure to engrave the brand signature luxuriously.

capabilities_cinematic.h_desc: The fusion of precision and sensory detail. Experience The Prime Da-on's high-end mass production ecosystem.
capabilities_cinematic.s1_desc: Accurate structural modeling in a digital environment to establish the perfect blueprint.
capabilities_cinematic.s2_desc: Advanced CO2 laser technology ensures smooth, flawless cutting of complex curves without burn marks.
capabilities_cinematic.s3_desc: The Prime Daon's proprietary clicking press process consistently replicates artisanal details even in mass production.
capabilities_cinematic.s4_c1_d: Completing 3D curved silhouettes impossible with standard flat sewing.
capabilities_cinematic.s4_c2_d: Controlling heat and pressure to engrave the brand signature luxuriously.
capabilities_cinematic.s4_desc: Combining experienced craftsmanship with specialized sewing infrastructure to bring out unparalleled durability.
capabilities_cinematic.mfg_subtitle: Your vision, masterfully brought to life.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_laser_desc: CO2 laser cutter. Ideal for precise CAD design execution.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_highpress_desc: Capable of rapidly cutting rolled fabrics.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_normal_sewing_desc: General sewing for leather and fabrics.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_tarp_sewing_desc: Used for sewing curved surfaces on leather or fabrics.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_post_sewing_desc: Specialized machine for sewing deep or hard-to-reach areas of leather goods.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_comp_sewing_desc: Facilitates precise sewing based on computerized positioning.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_heat_press_desc: Applies heat to bond leather or mold it using custom dies.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_hot_stamp_desc: Ideal for precise logo debossing and engraving.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_skiving_desc: Used to thin specific areas of the leather.
capabilities_cinematic.eq_dryer_desc: Drying equipment for rapid curing after edge coating (Kirime).
capabilities_cinematic.eq_gluing_desc: Used for applying adhesive to leather or fabrics.

ui.title: Collections
ui.desc: Discover the high-end manufacturing capabilities of The Prime Daon.
ui.drawer_craft_desc: Solid finishing, premium materials, and precision stitching. High-end processes satisfying both durability and aesthetics.
ui.drawer_cust_desc: 100% custom OEM/ODM mass production is possible, including leather material and color changes, corporate logo custom engraving, and packaging configuration.
ui.drawer_footer: This product is a reference model proving the perfect finish quality of The Prime Daon.
ui.btn_contact: 💡 Inquire about manufacturing costs for this style

process.section_title: The Journey of Trust, 6 Steps to Perfection.
process.section_desc: The Prime Daon directly controls all processes from planning to delivery in our own B2B factory for uncompromising quality.
process.helper_text: Click on a step to view detailed timeline specifications and deliverables.
process.preset_msg: I would like to request a consultation regarding [Process Inquiry: {title}].

steps.title: Briefing & Consultation
steps.content: We establish product direction by analyzing client needs and ideas. A dedicated expert from The Prime Daon is assigned to set clear standards.

steps.title: Estimation & Contract
steps.content: Based on the finalized plan, optimal production costs and schedules are calculated. Mutual trust is built through transparent cost estimation.
checks: Sign official B2B mass production contract

steps.title: Design & Prototyping
steps.content: Raw materials are carefully selected, and the 1st master sample is produced in the exact same environment as mass production.
checks: Finalize design, color, and material specs

steps.title: Refinement & Confirmation
steps.content: The produced sample is reviewed with the client, and details are modified. The final master sample for perfect mass production is established.

steps.title: Mass Production
steps.content: Mass production begins in earnest based on automated equipment with exactly 0.1mm tolerance to the final confirmed sample.
checks: Secure raw materials for mass production
Operate laser cutting and high-speed press

steps.title: QC & Logistics
steps.content: For uncompromising quality control, 100% precision inspection of all products is conducted, followed by perfect packaging and safe delivery.
checks: 100% inspection of all products for zero defect rate
Final safety packaging tailored to brand standards
Custom delivery to specific sites as requested by client

home_sections.brand_philosophy_desc: The essence of high-end lies in uncompromising details.<br className=\'hidden md:block\'/>Unrivaled process design and strictness exceeding global standards.<br className=\'hidden md:block\'/>Your vision becomes a perfect reality here.
home_sections.brand_philosophy2_desc: We design the value of luxury beyond simple manufacturing.<br className='hidden md:block'/>From selecting the finest hides to flawless finishing.<br className='hidden md:block'/>The Prime Daon presents a new standard in high-end leather craft.
home_sections.brand_philosophy0_desc: Realizing the high-end beyond your imagination.<br className=\'hidden md:block\'/>The combination of overwhelming technology and exquisite craftsmanship.<br className=\'hidden md:block\'/>Prove your brand value with perfectly controlled quality.
